Large Vinyl Banners # Large Banners ### The Number One Choice For Huge Banner Printing ![Custom large banner for Nexforce Expo event | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/430c7e0cbac3400c89e66c6774eb591a.jpg) * [Product Overview](#8bc32566-8dce-4a69-8ead-e1e1d83712f3) * [Material Options](#414f177e-49dc-4952-a213-2995646f35d1) * [Finishing Options](#1bbfe6d9-d35e-430f-8a20-9354f74c6123) * [Artwork Specs](#1c8491f8-38d2-4d15-87fd-aeda2bf50426) * [Production Times](#3036b4bf-4c1a-4fe8-b6e4-f1ed3b4eb490) * [Payment Options](#5aa990ad-6e15-4d76-b697-537bee839c82) * [Shipping Guidelines](#4e16188c-99ff-4b07-8139-146fcb2db78d) * [Viewing Distances](#4aceb0c6-9c59-4cfc-a913-3f2182375ae5) **_Due to the latest shipping regulations, all large banners will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please [contact us](https://www.banners.com/quotes) for a custom freight quote._** Go big with large banners from Banners.com. Ideal for covering large spaces and making a massive visual impact at high-profile locations, our huge banners offer unmatched visibility and quality. Our large scale custom banners are digitally printed in full color on durable 13 oz vinyl. They are scratch-proof, and waterproof which makes them very versatile and effective in demanding weather conditions. Our in-house team provides top-notch customer service and we’re always ready to provide assistance for your large banner printing needs. Browse our options below to get started on your order. Get an instant quote on a big vinyl banner in sizes as large as 16' x 50'. Standard production time is three business days. You can get started on your large vinyl banners today by simply uploading your artwork, creating a custom design with one of our free templates, or by selecting the option to have one of our professional designers create your banner. Large scale vinyl banners are Ideal for building wraps, stadium banners, and large-scale trade shows, our big banners deliver maximum visibility and impact. **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300), and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. Looking for something more specific? [We can customize your order through a custom quote](https://www.banners.com/quotes)! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders. #### Two Customizable Banner Materials Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application. **13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. **Mesh Banners** Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions. #### Vinyl Banner Finishing Options **Hems & Grommets** **Reinforced Hems** **Reinforced Corners** **Pole Pockets** ![Vin
